response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Kotlin, Python), frameworks (Nest.js, React, Node.js), and cloud/deployment tools (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS). His background includes high-load systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source contributions, aligning well with the role's requirements. While some secondary technologies like DLang are less relevant, his depth in core stacks and problem-solving abilities compensates.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack development with deep expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and multiple backend languages
Proven track record building scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of mails annually)
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and modern development practices (TDD, CI/CD, containerization)
concerns: Limited explicit experience with Vitest (though testing expertise is demonstrated with Jest)
No direct mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL in recent roles (MongoDB is highlighted)
Primary focus on AI-agent work may reduce immediate capacity for legacy system maintenance
